feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Public cloud CDS views (maintenance order & operation)
entry.content:
Dear team, for public cloud I need maintenance order and operation CDS view. please suggest some CDS view.

Thanks.

@aoyang

entry.title: How to Add a Release Approval Group for a Supplier
entry.content:
As a release approval group in the business partner management app supplier role
The following choices are available by default, but I would like to add a release approval group.
・Vendor A
・Vendor B
・Vendor C
・G/L accounts

Please tell me how to add it.

entry.title: How to get information about Sales Document Item Texts by Text Types？
entry.content:
Hi there,

We need to get information about Sales Document Item Texts by text types in Embedded SAC. We did not find any suitable standard CDS views.

How we can get this information?

Thank you.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: CDS view for planned delivery time in purchasing scheduling agreement
entry.content:
Unable to find a proper CDS view for the column Planned Delivery Time of purchasing scheduling agreements.


Could you please kindly let me know which CDS view or which App that can get the data? Thanks a lot. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Create a valuation grouping
entry.content:
Hello everyone!

I´m in need of creating a new valuation grouping for automatic account determiantion in a different comany code, which SSCUI do i have to configure to do this? and also if needed, what other configuration activities do I need to perform?

Thank you in advance

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sourcing and Procurement SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance

entry.title: Lock to duplicate lines of the same product manually and by migration.
entry.content:
Good morning everyone,
Can you help me determine if it's possible to block duplicate lines of the same product in the sales order natively or through development?

 

 

In the same way, from the app we can have a block that prevents uploading duplicate lines.

We welcome your comments.

entry.title: Public Cloud Custom Business object UI Tile
entry.content:
Dear All

We have created custom business objects using ADT in Eclipse and able to preview the App using ADT UI.

How can we assign custom business object App to a Tile in Public Cloud Environment.

entry.title: Error "403 Forbidden The request has been blocked by UCON" when creating Handling Unit in S4
entry.content:
Hi,

Context: I have a SAP DM enviroment integreated with S4 Public cloud. 

Objective: Create a HU in S4 from a production process in SAP DM, API: SAP Business Accelerator Hub

Error: When I execute the API in a production process in SAP DM, I get a 403 Forbidden error (see image). Apparently, SAP UCON is blocking the request.

 

 

I tested the same autentification for getting the data from order in S4 and it was working (API:SAP Business Accelerator Hub).

How can I solve this problem? 

 

Thanks for your help! 🙂

entry.title: S4 Public Cloud - EWM - How to print bin label
entry.content:
Hello,

All is on the title..

In S4 Public Cloud, how can I print bin label.

As in S4 on prem, there is an option in the monitor + a transaction; in public cloud I cannot find anything.

Thanks,

entry.title: the Datetime/DatetimeOffset format for filtering data when executing the API call
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I am currently experiencing issues with filtering a date-type entity when executing the API call. 

I tried these formats on the API Purchase Order(ODataV4) to filter data using the Try Out feature on Business Accelerator Hub.

$filter=LastChangeDateTime gt '2020-05-20T00:00:00Z'

$filter=LastChangeDateTime gt datetimeoffset'2020-05-20T00:00:00Z'

$filter=LastChangeDateTime gt datetimeoffset'2020-05-20T00:00:00.000Z'

However, none of them worked, and I received this error message.

{
  "error": {
    "code": "005056A509B11EE1BB8AF4A65EC3CA20",
    "message": {
      "lang": "en",
      "value": "Invalid parametertype used at function 'gt' (Position: 14)"
    },
    "innererror": {
      "transactionid": "600414ADECD10160E0067EE577579611",
      "timestamp": "20250404072147.4033660",
      "Error_Resolution": {
        "SAP_Transaction": "For backend administrators: use ADT feed reader \"SAP Gateway Error Log\" or run transaction /IWFND/ERROR_LOG on SAP Gateway hub system and search for entries with the timestamp above for more details",
        "SAP_Note": "See SAP Note 1797736 for error analysis (https://service.sap.com/sap/support/notes/1797736)"
      }
    }
  }
}

Please can someone tell me how I can filter data-type entities? What format is correct?

I'm not sure but I heard Datetime is not available for OData4, so if there is any way to filter data-type entities, I would appreceate it if you gave me some advice!!

 

Thanks.

Regards,

entry.title: Delete Business Partner in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud is not possible
entry.content:
Hallo,

we try to delete a Business Partner in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud. At last step we use App "Manage Archiving Variants" to delete BP with object CA_BUPA. We already customized ILM and blocked Business Partner. Other BP have been already deleted.

For one Business partner we get error message "Relationship with Org Management "number of BP"". With app "Display BP relationship" we checked relationships but there is no more relationship.

What does error message "Relationship with Org Management" mean in this context?

entry.title: Cannot receive Order Confirmation Request linked from Ariba in scope item 42k in S/4 Hana Cloud
entry.content:
I have a question about the Hana Cloud-ARIBA integration in scope item 42K

Currently, I am able to integrate purchase orders created in Hana Cloud with the business network (buyers and suppliers).

However, when the supplier executes order confirmation for a linked purchase order, an error occurs when it is received on the Hana Cloud side.

Error Message 'S4 system response is FAILED and ErrorCode:NA and ErrorResponse: .. Suggested Action : Document failed to deliver to S4HANA System. ErrorCode:CIG-PLT-00649.'

Do you know the cause of this error?

Transaction Tracker

entry.title: CB User ID
entry.content:
We would like to create an identical CB User ID in both the Test and Production S/HANA Cloud Systems. Is this possible?

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Settlement Entry Not Generated for Production Order – Request for Analysis
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,

I am currently working on creating Production Orders in SAP. However, I have encountered an issue where the settlement entry for the Production Order is not being posted. After confirming the Production Order, the system does not generate the settlement accounting entry as expected.

Here is a brief outline of the process I am following:

  • The material has a multi-level BOM.
  • I run MRP, which generates a planned order.
  • I convert the planned order to a production order.
  • I then confirm the production order.

Despite following the standard process, the settlement entry is missing. I kindly request your assistance in analyzing this issue and helping resolve it.

Please let me know if you require any further information or logs to investigate this further.



Kindly check and assist.

entry.title: How to Deactivate Quality Inspection for a Movement Type In S4 Hana Public Cloud?
entry.content:
Dear All,

 

How to Deactivate Quality Inspection for a Movement Type In S4 PERSON_NAME Public Cloud?

entry.title: Not authorized for Create Document with custom DMS document type in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
We are getting the error in Create Document (CV01n) app as not authorized for Create Document with custom document type beginning with Z

 

But for the User we have already assigned the respective catalogs :  SAP_PLM_BC_DIR_MC  & SAP_PLM_BC_DIR_EXTD_MC  with full access, but still the same

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Change created own overhead rate in costing sheet
entry.content:
Dear Community,

it is possible to change or delete wrong created overhead rates? We created our own overhead rate but we set the wrong Dependency.

entry.title: How to create a OData Service in Public Cloud?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I've questions below.

How to create an OData Service in SAP Public Cloud?

Where do I find the GET Entity method and GET EntitySet Method?

Where do I pass the Input JSON for the POST method?

I want to create an OData with CRUD operations in the SAP Public Cloud.

Can anyone suggest the best practice?

Thanks,

Naveen.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition  

OData

entry.title: Year end revenue adjustment automatically in Public cloud
entry.content: We want to check with if the year-end deferrals/accrual adjustments in the preceding year can be configured to be automatically reversed the following year? For example, the deferrals/accruals generated in the system in December 2024 can be automatically reverse in January 2025. If cannot be automatically reverse, how can we reverse the YE deferral/accrual in P/L that is currently lying in the balance sheet account. please help.

entry.content:
How to create Technical User in SAP Public Cloud Applications for running batch jobs.
